name: docpilot-knipexilino
description: DocPilot / Knipexilino - KI-Dokumenten-Assistent, Fallmanager und lokales Dokumenten-Gedaechtnis.

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && node -e "fs.writeFileSync('dist/index.html', fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8').replace('<script>','<script type=module defer>'))" && cp -f src/communication_engine.js dist/ 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.android:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:build: npm run android:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
